metadata.title: SAFECode — Software Integrity Controls → AppSec Core V1 (with ACR-001, ACR-002, ACR-004 incorporated) (Concept Crosswalk)
metadata.schema-basis: NIST IR 8477 relationship vocabulary + NIST IR 8278A r1 STRM resource model

reference-document.title: AppSec Core V1 (with ACR-001, ACR-002, ACR-004 incorporated)
reference-document.author: SbD-ToE Programme — AppSec Core ontology project

metadata.methodology: Threshold-based continuous→categorical translation: sim≥0.6 → equal; 0.4≤sim<0.6 → intersects-with; sim<0.4 → unspecified. Multi-claim per source-item: one row per (source-item, target-Core-entity) unique pair using highest-similarity claim for that target. is-primary="true" marks item overall highest-similarity claim's target. subset-of / superset-of NOT in first cut (cosine similarity lacks directional info; SME refinement future work). STRM resource model: pilot doc → DocumentaryImpl; source-item → ConcreteImpl; AppSec Core V1 → Reference Document; Core entity → Concept.

source-element.description: Vendor Sourcing Integrity Controls. Controls for vendor sourcing process: contractual integrity, defined expectations, ownership, vulnerability response, security training, OSS management

reference-element.description: Release Promotion Controls. Keep explicit human accountability for irreversible production promotion. Promote only artifacts whose identity, signature or provenance has been verified at release time.…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.506; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim SAFECODE_SIC_2010-CLAIM-000001 at Mechanism level. Primary anchor (item highest-similarity claim).

source-element.description: Vendor Sourcing Integrity Controls. Controls for vendor sourcing process: contractual integrity, defined expectations, ownership, vulnerability response, security training, OSS management

reference-element.description: Approved Source And Registry Governance. Limit acquisition and promotion to approved repositories, registries and trusted base-image sources. policy and gate enforcement. approval

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.471; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim SAFECODE_SIC_2010-CLAIM-000002 at Practice level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: Vendor Contractual Integrity Controls. Written agreements with explicit expectations, security requirements, ownership responsibilities, vulnerability response commitments
